scripts.dev: lsof -ti:6969 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:6970 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; docker start mailpit 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name mailpit -p 1025:1025 -p 8025:8025 axllent/mailpit 2>/dev/null || brew services start mailpit 2>/dev/null || echo 'ℹ Mailpit not running'; export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && envsubst < postgrest.conf > /tmp/pgrst.conf && nohup postgrest /tmp/pgrst.conf > /tmp/postgrest.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; astro dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 6969
